channel.title: AI Tips Personal Feed
channel.description: A personal RSS feed focused on practical AI tips, tutorials, and techniques.

item.title: Inside our approach to the Model Spec
item.description: [OpenAI News] Learn how OpenAI’s Model Spec serves as a public framework for model behavior, balancing safety, user freedom, and accountability as AI systems advance.

item.title: Introducing the OpenAI Safety Bug Bounty program
item.description: [OpenAI News] OpenAI launches a Safety Bug Bounty program to identify AI abuse and safety risks, including agentic vulnerabilities, prompt injection, and data exfiltration.

item.title: Helping developers build safer AI experiences for teens
item.description: [OpenAI News] OpenAI releases prompt-based teen safety policies for developers using gpt-oss-safeguard, helping moderate age-specific risks in AI systems.

item.title: Powering product discovery in ChatGPT
item.description: [OpenAI News] ChatGPT introduces richer, visually immersive shopping powered by the Agentic Commerce Protocol, enabling product discovery, side-by-side comparisons, and merchant integration.

item.title: Update on the OpenAI Foundation
item.description: [OpenAI News] The OpenAI Foundation announces plans to invest at least $1 billion in curing diseases, economic opportunity, AI resilience, and community programs.

item.title: A New Framework for Evaluating Voice Agents (EVA)
item.description: [Hugging Face Blog]

item.title: Creating with Sora Safely
item.description: [OpenAI News] To address the novel safety challenges posed by a state-of-the-art video model as well as a new social creation platform, we’ve built Sora 2 and the Sora app with safety at the foundation. Our approach is anchored in concrete protections.

item.title: Build a Domain-Specific Embedding Model in Under a Day
item.description: [Hugging Face Blog]

item.title: How we monitor internal coding agents for misalignment
item.description: [OpenAI News] How OpenAI uses chain-of-thought monitoring to study misalignment in internal coding agents—analyzing real-world deployments to detect risks and strengthen AI safety safeguards.

item.title: OpenAI to acquire Astral
item.description: [OpenAI News] Accelerates Codex growth to power the next generation of Python developer tools

item.title: Holotron-12B - High Throughput Computer Use Agent
item.description: [Hugging Face Blog]

item.title: OpenAI Japan announces Japan Teen Safety Blueprint to put teen safety first
item.description: [OpenAI News] OpenAI Japan announces the Japan Teen Safety Blueprint, introducing stronger age protections, parental controls, and well-being safeguards for teens using generative AI.

item.title: Introducing GPT-5.4 mini and nano
item.description: [OpenAI News] GPT-5.4 mini and nano are smaller, faster versions of GPT-5.4 optimized for coding, tool use, multimodal reasoning, and high-volume API and sub-agent workloads.

item.title: Equipping workers with insights about compensation
item.description: [OpenAI News] New research shows Americans send nearly 3 million daily messages to ChatGPT asking about compensation and earnings, helping close the wage information gap.

item.title: Why Codex Security Doesn’t Include a SAST Report
item.description: [OpenAI News] A deep dive into why Codex Security doesn’t rely on traditional SAST, instead using AI-driven constraint reasoning and validation to find real vulnerabilities with fewer false positives.

item.title: Rakuten fixes issues twice as fast with Codex
item.description: [OpenAI News] Rakuten uses Codex, the coding agent from OpenAI, to ship software faster and safer, reducing MTTR 50%, automating CI/CD reviews, and delivering full-stack builds in weeks.

item.title: Designing AI agents to resist prompt injection
item.description: [OpenAI News] How ChatGPT defends against prompt injection and social engineering by constraining risky actions and protecting sensitive data in agent workflows.

item.title: From model to agent: Equipping the Responses API with a computer environment
item.description: [OpenAI News] How OpenAI built an agent runtime using the Responses API, shell tool, and hosted containers to run secure, scalable agents with files, tools, and state.

item.title: Wayfair boosts catalog accuracy and support speed with OpenAI
item.description: [OpenAI News] Wayfair uses OpenAI models to improve ecommerce support and product catalog accuracy, automating ticket triage and enhancing millions of product attributes at scale.

item.title: Improving instruction hierarchy in frontier LLMs
item.description: [OpenAI News] IH-Challenge trains models to prioritize trusted instructions, improving instruction hierarchy, safety steerability, and resistance to prompt injection attacks.

item.title: Introducing Storage Buckets on the Hugging Face Hub
item.description: [Hugging Face Blog]

item.title: OpenAI to acquire Promptfoo
item.description: [OpenAI News] OpenAI is acquiring Promptfoo, an AI security platform that helps enterprises identify and remediate vulnerabilities in AI systems during development.

item.title: Ulysses Sequence Parallelism: Training with Million-Token Contexts
item.description: [Hugging Face Blog]

item.title: Codex Security: now in research preview
item.description: [OpenAI News] Codex Security is an AI application security agent that analyzes project context to detect, validate, and patch complex vulnerabilities with higher confidence and less noise.

item.title: How Descript enables multilingual video dubbing at scale
item.description: [OpenAI News] Descript uses OpenAI models to scale multilingual video dubbing, optimizing translations for both meaning and timing so dubbed speech sounds natural across languages.

item.title: How Balyasny Asset Management built an AI research engine for investing
item.description: [OpenAI News] See how Balyasny built an AI research system with GPT-5.4, rigorous model evaluation, and agent workflows to transform investment analysis at scale.

item.title: Bringing Robotics AI to Embedded Platforms: Dataset Recording, VLA Fine‑Tuning, and On‑Device Optimizations
item.description: [Hugging Face Blog]

item.title: Introducing GPT-5.4
item.description: [OpenAI News] Introducing GPT-5.4, OpenAI’s most most capable and efficient frontier model for professional work, with state-of-the-art coding, computer use, tool search, and 1M-token context.

item.title: Reasoning models struggle to control their chains of thought, and that’s good
item.description: [OpenAI News] OpenAI introduces CoT-Control and finds reasoning models struggle to control their chains of thought, reinforcing monitorability as an AI safety safeguard.

item.title: Ensuring AI use in education leads to opportunity
item.description: [OpenAI News] OpenAI shares new tools, certifications, and measurement resources to help schools and universities close AI capability gaps and expand opportunity.

item.title: Introducing ChatGPT for Excel and new financial data integrations
item.description: [OpenAI News] OpenAI introduces ChatGPT for Excel and new financial app integrations, powered by GPT-5.4 to accelerate modeling, research, and analysis in regulated environments.

item.title: The five AI value models driving business reinvention
item.description: [OpenAI News] Five AI value models show how leaders can sequence AI from workforce fluency to process reinvention and build durable business advantage.

item.title: Introducing the Adoption news channel
item.description: [OpenAI News] Practical insights and frameworks to turn AI progress into business advantage

item.title: Introducing Modular Diffusers - Composable Building Blocks for Diffusion Pipelines
item.description: [Hugging Face Blog]

item.title: Understanding AI and learning outcomes
item.description: [OpenAI News] OpenAI introduces the Learning Outcomes Measurement Suite to assess AI’s impact on student learning across diverse educational environments over time.

item.title: How Axios uses AI to help deliver high-impact local journalism
item.description: [OpenAI News] Axios COO Allison Murphy explains how the company uses AI to support local reporters, streamline newsroom workflows, and deliver high-impact local journalism at scale.

item.title: PRX Part 3 — Training a Text-to-Image Model in 24h!
item.description: [Hugging Face Blog]

item.title: Our agreement with the Department of War
item.description: [OpenAI News] Details on OpenAI’s contract with the Department of War, outlining safety red lines, legal protections, and how AI systems will be deployed in classified environments.

item.title: Scaling AI for everyone
item.description: [OpenAI News] Today we’re announcing $110B in new investment at a $730B pre money valuation. This includes $30B from SoftBank, $30B from NVIDIA, and $50B from Amazon.

item.title: Introducing the Stateful Runtime Environment for Agents in Amazon Bedrock
item.description: [OpenAI News] Stateful Runtime for Agents in Amazon Bedrock brings persistent orchestration, memory, and secure execution to multi-step AI workflows powered by OpenAI.

item.title: OpenAI and Amazon announce strategic partnership
item.description: [OpenAI News] OpenAI and Amazon announce a strategic partnership bringing OpenAI’s Frontier platform to AWS, expanding AI infrastructure, custom models, and enterprise AI agents.

item.title: Joint Statement from OpenAI and Microsoft
item.description: [OpenAI News] Microsoft and OpenAI continue to work closely across research, engineering, and product development, building on years of deep collaboration and shared success.

item.title: An update on our mental health-related work
item.description: [OpenAI News] OpenAI shares updates on its mental health safety work, including parental controls, trusted contacts, improved distress detection, and recent litigation developments.

item.title: Pacific Northwest National Laboratory and OpenAI partner to accelerate federal permitting
item.description: [OpenAI News] OpenAI and Pacific Northwest National Laboratory introduce DraftNEPABench, a new benchmark evaluating how AI coding agents can accelerate federal permitting—showing potential to reduce NEPA drafting time by up to 15% and modernize infrastructure reviews.

item.title: OpenAI Codex and Figma launch seamless code-to-design experience
item.description: [OpenAI News] OpenAI and Figma launch a new Codex integration that connects code and design, enabling teams to move between implementation and the Figma canvas to iterate and ship faster.

item.title: Disrupting malicious uses of AI | February 2026
item.description: [OpenAI News] Our latest threat report examines how malicious actors combine AI models with websites and social platforms—and what it means for detection and defense.

item.title: Arvind KC appointed Chief People Officer
item.description: [OpenAI News] OpenAI appoints Arvind KC as Chief People Officer to help scale the company, strengthen its culture, and lead how work evolves in the age of AI.

item.title: Why we no longer evaluate SWE-bench Verified
item.description: [OpenAI News] SWE-bench Verified is increasingly contaminated and mismeasures frontier coding progress. Our analysis shows flawed tests and training leakage. We recommend SWE-bench Pro.

item.title: OpenAI announces Frontier Alliance Partners
item.description: [OpenAI News] OpenAI announces Frontier Alliance Partners to help enterprises move from AI pilots to production with secure, scalable agent deployments.

item.title: Our First Proof submissions
item.description: [OpenAI News] We share our AI model’s proof attempts for the First Proof math challenge, testing research-grade reasoning on expert-level problems.
